paper_title: QDM Imaging and Analysis of Speleothem Samples

methods.description: This method involves using Quantum Diamond Microscope (QDM) imaging to analyze the magnetic properties of speleothem samples. The process includes preparing the sample, imaging it under specific conditions, and processing the resulting data to study magnetic field variations over time.

steps.description: Binned pixels by a factor of 4 to achieve a spatial resolution of 4.7 µm per pixel.
steps.searchable_summary: bin pixels to achieve desired spatial resolution

steps.description: Imaged an approximately 5 × 10 mm sample with 0.5 mm thickness polished with 1 µm alumina grit extracted from the flank of the speleothem.
Acquired QDM magnetic field maps in an instantaneous bias magnetic field of 0.9 mT, reversed repeatedly to provide a near-zero net bias field.
steps.searchable_summary: acquire magnetic field maps with QDM

steps.description: Ran the QDM in projective magnetic microscopy (PMM) mode to maximize the signal-to-noise ratio.
Recomputed maps to show the magnetic field component perpendicular to the surface (Bz) using a Fourier algorithm.
steps.searchable_summary: compute Bz component using Fourier transform

steps.description: Measured a backfield IRM acquisition sequence for a single field of view in steps of 2-10 mT up to 60 mT.
Subtracted blank magnetic field maps of an empty, polished quartz plate from the maps of speleothem magnetic fields.
steps.searchable_summary: subtract blank maps from speleothem maps

steps.description: Stitched together the magnetic field maps by matching features in an optical image taken over the overlapping region.
steps.searchable_summary: stitch magnetic field maps using optical images

steps.description: Averaged the magnetic field value from pixels along lines parallel to visible laminae to produce a curve for the mean magnetic field intensity as a function of time.
steps.searchable_summary: average magnetic field values along laminae

steps.description: Assigned calendar year ages to each data point in the time series of magnetic field strength using linear interpolations between U-Th ages.
steps.searchable_summary: assign ages to magnetic field data points

methods.method_name: Spectral Analysis of Magnetic Field Time Series
methods.description: This method involves performing spectral analysis on the magnetic field time series to identify periodicities using REDFIT and wavelet analyses.

steps.description: Performed spectral analysis to identify periodicities in the magnetic field time series using REDFIT and wavelet analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: perform spectral analysis on time series
